text: Critical thinking is the objective analysis and evaluation of claims to form a judgment. Skills: identify assumptions, evaluate evidence, recognize logical fallacies, consider alternative perspectives. System 1 (fast, intuitive) vs. System 2 (slow, deliberate) — Kahneman. Cognitive biases (confirmation bias, anchoring, availability heuristic) disto
